1.Title: Innocent Idealism
1.Description: When Promeia uses <color=#FFFFFF>Ultimate: Glaciating Impalement</color>, she gains an additional effect: if <color=#FFFFFF>Trial by Cold</color> points are not at maximum, gain 1 point of <color=#FFFFFF>Trial by Cold</color>. This effect can trigger once after using <color=#FFFFFF>Ultimate: Glaciating Impalement</color>. When any squad member triggers <color=#FFFFFF>Abloom</color> on enemies with <color=#FFFFFF>Presumption of Guilt</color>, it ignores an additional 20% DEF.
1.Lore:
This is a chaotic, lawless land.
Roaring engines and swirling dust, steel clashing with flesh. Conflict and violence play out day and night.
An innocent child grips an equally innocent weapon, wandering the same lost red earth.
"Would you be willing to do your part for the peace here?"

2.Title: Faltering Conviction
2.Description: Promeia's Anomaly Proficiency increases by 40. The multiplier of <color=#FFFFFF>Abloom</color> triggered by consuming <color=#FFFFFF>Trial by Cold</color> increases by 120%.
2.Lore:
She became an exceptional Sweeper — swift, precise, and silent. Her targets were clear and countless: Ethereals, those infected with irreversible Corruption, those fated to turn into Ethereals... every kill marked by bloodshed and the echoes of their cries.
But... is it right?
"This is a Sweeper's duty!" "Just think of it as... for the greater good, got it?" "Those people were going to die anyway." ...
"It's a necessary sacrifice."

3.Title: Cruel Moonlight
3.Lore:
The truth is often carved out from an unremarkable accident.
"You think the Sweepers could get rich just by dealing with worthless Ethereals?"
"Gang wars are a guaranteed profit. If you're afraid of getting your hands dirty, the 'Black Wolf' is more than eager..."
Night fell soon after, earlier than anyone expected.
The Sweepers, Calydon, the gangs with names and those without... in this chaotic age, all seemed to vanish into the endless dark.

4.Title: Ruthless Accusation
4.Description: When Promeia triggers <color=#FFFFFF>Abloom</color>, she restores 5 <color=#FFFFFF>Corrosive Chill</color>. This effect can trigger once every 0.5s.
4.Lore:
An invitation arrived, summoning a moth to its judgment.
The right to choose, light, justice, and everything that made her "Promeia."
She put on the handcuffs and chose exile for herself.
"This is my final choice."

5.Title: The Dying Moth
5.Lore:
She buried herself in her work.
Investigations, interrogations, judgments... an endless list.
Her colleagues watched her with concern.
"How long are you going to keep this up...?"
"Until every last sin is atoned for... or until death takes me."

6.Title: To Be Continued
6.Description: When Promeia consumes <color=#FFFFFF>Trial by Cold</color> to trigger <color=#FFFFFF>Abloom</color>, it triggers an additional special <color=#FFFFFF>Abloom</color> effect, dealing Attribute Anomaly DMG of the corresponding attribute at a fixed 200% multiplier. 5 <color=#FFFFFF>Corrosive Chill</color> and 100 Decibels are also restored. This effect can trigger at most once every 15s. In addition, Attribute Anomaly DMG and <color=#FFFFFF>Disorder</color> DMG dealt by Promeia ignore 15% of enemies' All-Attribute RES.
6.Lore:
The end didn't arrive as expected, and the night wasn't as dark as imagined.
Colleagues, old acquaintances, late-night lights, and new friends...
The poor moth still couldn't shake off these heavy gifts, and that long-awaited ending now felt even further away.
But maybe... such a fate isn't so bad.

DescriptionByLevel.1:
If Promeia's initial Anomaly Mastery exceeds 150, each additional point increases her Anomaly Proficiency by 1.5 and increases the whole squad's <color=#FFFFFF>Abloom</color> DMG by 0.35%.
Promeia gains a set amount of <color=#FFFFFF>Corrosive Chill</color> when her attacks hit enemies. When squad members trigger <color=#98EFF0>Freeze</color>/<color=#FFFFFF>Disorder</color>, when the enemy is inflicted with <color=#FFFFFF>Vortex</color>, or when Promeia triggers <color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack: Execution - Shrouded in Shadow</color>, she gains an additional 5/5/5/10 <color=#FFFFFF>Corrosive Chill</color>, up to a maximum of 100 <color=#FFFFFF>Corrosive Chill</color>.
When a squad member triggers and hits an enemy with <color=#FFFFFF>Abloom</color>, Promeia gains an additional 15 <color=#FFFFFF>Corrosive Chill</color>.
When <color=#FFFFFF>Corrosive Chill</color> reaches at least 50, 50 <color=#FFFFFF>Corrosive Chill</color> is consumed and converted into 1 point of <color=#FFFFFF>Trial by Cold</color>, up to a maximum of 2 points of <color=#FFFFFF>Trial by Cold</color>.
Upon entering the battlefield, Promeia gains 2 points of <color=#FFFFFF>Trial by Cold</color>.
When the finishing move of <color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack: Execution - Merciless Judgment</color> hits an enemy afflicted with <color=#98EFF0>Ice Anomaly</color>, <color=#FE437E>Ether Anomaly</color>, <color=#2EB6FF>Electric Anomaly</color>, <color=#FF5521>Fire Anomaly</color>, <color=#F0D12B>Physical Anomaly</color>, or <color=#A6C5FD>Wind Anomaly</color>, it triggers <color=#FFFFFF>Abloom</color> once, dealing <color=#2BAD00>330%</color> Attribute Anomaly DMG of the corresponding attribute. The skill consumes 1 <color=#FFFFFF>Trial by Cold</color> upon activation.
When Promeia triggers and hits an enemy with <color=#FFFFFF>Abloom</color>, she gains an additional 100 Decibels. This effect can trigger once every 0.5s. Using <color=#FFFFFF>Ultimate: Glaciating Impalement</color> grants <color=#FFFFFF>Frost Oath</color>. With <color=#FFFFFF>Frost Oath</color>, after using <color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack: Execution - Merciless Judgment</color>, <color=#FFFFFF>Chain Attack: Hanging Judgment</color>, or <color=#FFFFFF>Ultimate: Glaciating Impalement</color>, press or hold <IconMap:Icon_Special> to consume <color=#FFFFFF>Frost Oath</color> and immediately follow up with <color=#FFFFFF>Special Attack: Execution - Layered Frost</color>. Only 1 stack of <color=#FFFFFF>Frost Oath</color> can be held.

The skill consumes 1 <color=#FFFFFF>Trial by Cold</color> upon activation.

MathSkill.Title: Additional Ability: Vessel of Ice
MathSkill.Description:
When another character in your squad is an <color=#FFFFFF>Anomaly</color> or <color=#FFFFFF>Support</color> character:
When using an <color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack</color>, Promeia's <color=#98EFF0>Ice Anomaly Buildup Rate</color> increases by 30% for 30s. Repeated triggers refresh the duration.
When any squad member applies the <color=#98EFF0>Frostbite</color> effect to an enemy, its duration is increased by 3s.
When Promeia's <color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack</color> hits an enemy, it inflicts <color=#FFFFFF>Presumption of Guilt</color>. When any squad member triggers <color=#FFFFFF>Abloom</color> on a target with <color=#FFFFFF>Presumption of Guilt</color>, it ignores 40% of the target's DEF. <color=#FFFFFF>Presumption of Guilt</color> lasts 30s, and repeated triggers refresh the duration.

154100001.Title: Basic Attack: Sweeping Edge
154100001.Description:
Press <IconMap:Icon_Normal> to activate:
Performs up to five attacks against enemies ahead, dealing <color=#98EFF0>Ice DMG</color>.
After landing the fifth hit's downward attack, and with sufficient <color=#FFFFFF>Trial by Cold</color>, keep holding <IconMap:Icon_Special> or <IconMap:Icon_Normal> to chain into <color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack: Execution - Merciless Judgment</color>.
Enters the <color=#FFFFFF>Bound Absolution</color> state after throwing the cape during the fourth hit.

154100002.Title: Basic Attack: Whirling Blade
154100002.Description:
Hold <IconMap:Icon_Normal> to activate:
Promeia leaps into the air and attacks, throwing her cape beside the enemy and entering the <color=#FFFFFF>Bound Absolution</color> state, dealing <color=#98EFF0>Ice DMG</color>.
Hitting enemies does not accumulate <color=#FFFFFF>Corrosive Chill</color>.

154100003.Title: Bound Absolution
154100003.Description:
When using certain skills, Promeia throws her cape to continuously slice enemies, dealing <color=#98EFF0>Ice DMG</color>. Does not accumulate <color=#FFFFFF>Corrosive Chill</color> upon hit.
While the cape remains out, Promeia can walk slowly.
Press <IconMap:Icon_Normal> or <IconMap:Icon_Special> during this period to immediately follow up with the 5th hit of <color=#FFFFFF>Basic Attack: Sweeping Edge</color>.
If attacked during this period, Promeia triggers a <color=#FFFFFF>Perfect Dodge</color> automatically. The dodge can trigger once every 20s.

154100030.Description: Cloak Slash DMG Per Second Multiplier

154100004.Title: Special Attack: Execution - Cold Flash
154100004.Description:
Press <IconMap:Icon_Special> to activate:
Launches a flying blade attack, dealing <color=#98EFF0>Ice DMG</color>.

154100005.Title: EX Special Attack: Execution - Glacial Death
154100005.Description:
With enough Energy, press <IconMap:Icon_SpecialReady> to activate:
Performs a flying blade attack, throwing her cape beside the enemy and entering the <color=#FFFFFF>Bound Absolution</color> state, dealing <color=#98EFF0>Ice DMG</color>.
If attacked by an enemy shortly after using the move, automatically chains into <color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack: Execution - Shrouded in Shadow</color>.
Upon use, Promeia gains the <color=#FFFFFF>Absolute Order</color> effect.
Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

154100006.Title: EX Special Attack: Execution - Shrouded in Shadow
154100006.Description:
Triggers automatically when hit shortly upon activating <color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack: Execution - Glacial Death</color>:
Enters the <color=#FFFFFF>Vital View</color> state briefly and swiftly circles behind the enemy.
After triggering a <color=#FFFFFF>Perfect Dodge</color>, and with enough Energy, press <IconMap:Icon_SpecialReady> to consume 40 Energy and activate <color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack: Execution - Shrouded in Shadow</color>, gaining the <color=#FFFFFF>Absolute Order</color> effect.
Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

154100007.Title: Special Attack: Execution - Descending Frost
154100007.Description:
While under the <color=#FFFFFF>Absolute Order</color> effect, press <IconMap:Icon_Normal> or <IconMap:Icon_Special> while in the <color=#FFFFFF>Bound Absolution</color> state to activate:
Leaps toward the enemy, retrieving the cape while performing a descending attack that deals <color=#98EFF0>Ice DMG</color>.
After landing, if Promeia possesses <color=#FFFFFF>Trial by Cold</color>, keep holding <IconMap:Icon_Normal> or <IconMap:Icon_Special> to chain into <color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack: Execution - Merciless Judgment</color>.
Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

154100008.Title: Special Attack: Execution - Layered Frost
154100008.Description:
After triggering <color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack: Execution - Shrouded in Shadow</color>, press <IconMap:Icon_Normal> or <IconMap:Icon_Special> to activate:
Quickly launches a flurry of attacks, then leaps toward the enemy, retrieving the cape while performing a more powerful downward attack that deals <color=#98EFF0>Ice DMG</color>.
After landing, if Promeia possesses <color=#FFFFFF>Trial by Cold</color>, keep holding <IconMap:Icon_Normal> or <IconMap:Icon_Special> to chain into <color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack: Execution - Merciless Judgment</color>.
Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

154100009.Title: EX Special Attack: Execution - Merciless Judgment
154100009.Description:
With enough <color=#FFFFFF>Trial by Cold</color> and after performing the final hit of <color=#FFFFFF>Basic Attack: Sweeping Edge</color>, <color=#FFFFFF>Special Attack: Execution - Descending Frost</color>, or <color=#FFFFFF>Special Attack: Execution - Layered Frost</color>, keep holding <IconMap:Icon_Normal> or <IconMap:Icon_Special> after landing to activate:
Quickly leaps back while unleashing a more powerful finishing move, dealing <color=#98EFF0>Ice DMG</color>.
Hitting enemies does not accumulate <color=#FFFFFF>Corrosive Chill</color>.
After using this skill, hold <IconMap:Icon_Normal> or <IconMap:Icon_Special>, or press <IconMap:Icon_Normal> to immediately follow up with the 5th hit of <color=#FFFFFF>Basic Attack: Sweeping Edge</color>.
Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

154100037.Title: EX Special Attack: Execution - Glacial Death

154100047.Title: EX Special Attack: Execution - Merciless Judgment

154100010.Title: Dodge: Veiled Step
154100010.Description:
Press <IconMap:Icon_Evade> to activate:
A quick dash dodge.
Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

154100011.Title: Dash Attack: Grim Reap
154100011.Description:
Press <IconMap:Icon_Normal> during a dodge to activate:
Delivers a quick attack forward, dealing <color=#98EFF0>Ice DMG</color>.

154100012.Title: Dodge Counter: Soaring Bat
154100012.Description:
Press <IconMap:Icon_Normal> during a <color=#FFFFFF>Perfect Dodge</color> to activate:
Unleashes consecutive attacks against the target, dealing <color=#98EFF0>Ice DMG</color>.
After using this skill, it can be immediately followed up with the 5th hit of <color=#FFFFFF>Basic Attack: Sweeping Edge</color>.
Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

154100013.Title: Chain Attack: Hanging Judgment
154100013.Description:
When a <color=#FFFFFF>Chain Attack</color> is triggered, select the character to activate:
Throws flying blades and hangs upside down above the enemy, unleashing a flurry of attacks and ending with a finishing move, dealing massive <color=#98EFF0>Ice DMG</color>.
When the heavy attack hits an enemy afflicted with <color=#98EFF0>Ice Anomaly</color>, <color=#FE437E>Ether Anomaly</color>, <color=#2EB6FF>Electric Anomaly</color>, <color=#FF5521>Fire Anomaly</color>, <color=#F0D12B>Physical Anomaly</color>, or <color=#A6C5FD>Wind Anomaly</color>, it triggers <color=#FFFFFF>Abloom</color> once, dealing 100% Attribute Anomaly DMG of the corresponding attribute.
After using this skill, it can be immediately followed up with the 5th hit of <color=#FFFFFF>Basic Attack: Sweeping Edge</color>.
Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

154100014.Title: Ultimate: Glaciating Impalement
154100014.Description:
When Decibel Rating is at <color=#FFFFFF>Maximum</color>, press <IconMap:Icon_UltimateReady> to activate:
Launches a series of forward attacks, dealing massive <color=#98EFF0>Ice DMG</color>.
When the heavy attack hits an enemy afflicted with <color=#98EFF0>Ice Anomaly</color>, <color=#FE437E>Ether Anomaly</color>, <color=#2EB6FF>Electric Anomaly</color>, <color=#FF5521>Fire Anomaly</color>, <color=#F0D12B>Physical Anomaly</color>, or <color=#A6C5FD>Wind Anomaly</color>, it triggers <color=#FFFFFF>Abloom</color> once, dealing 250% Attribute Anomaly DMG of the corresponding attribute.
After using this skill, it can be immediately followed up with the 5th hit of <color=#FFFFFF>Basic Attack: Sweeping Edge</color>.
Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

154100016.Title: Quick Assist: Ambushing Strike
154100016.Description:
When the active character is launched, press <IconMap:Icon_Switch> to activate:
Unleashes consecutive attacks against the target, dealing <color=#98EFF0>Ice DMG</color>.
Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

154100017.Title: Defensive Assist: Injunction
154100017.Description:
When the on-field character is about to be attacked, press <IconMap:Icon_Switch> to activate:
Parries the enemy's attack, dealing massive Daze.
Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

154100018.Title: Assist Follow-Up: Intercepting Strike
154100018.Description:
Press <IconMap:Icon_Normal> after a <color=#FFFFFF>Defensive Assist</color> to activate:
Unleashes consecutive attacks against the target, dealing <color=#98EFF0>Ice DMG</color>.
After using this skill, it can be immediately followed up with the 5th hit of <color=#FFFFFF>Basic Attack: Sweeping Edge</color>.
Character is invulnerable while using this skill.
